errors: YouTube upload failed: No access, refresh token, API key or refresh handler callback is set.
YouTube upload failed: No access, refresh token, API key or refresh handler callback is set.

Authentication failed: invalid_grant. Your YOUTUBE_REFRESH_TOKEN has expired or been revoked. Steps to fix:
  1. Run "node setup_auth.js" locally
  2. Get the new refresh_token from config/token.json
  3. Update YOUTUBE_REFRESH_TOKEN in GitHub Secrets
  4. Make sure your Google app is in "Production" mode (not Testing)
